name: url-influence
description: Experiment: does an opaque URL alone steer an LLM's output because the content was in training, and does the effect track the model's knowledge cutoff?
author: Paul Kinlan <paul.kinlan@gmail.com>

scripts.pilot: node src/validate-corpus.mjs && node src/run.mjs --pilot && node src/score.mjs && node src/transcript.mjs && node src/analyze.mjs && node src/dashboard.mjs
scripts.full: node src/validate-corpus.mjs && node src/run.mjs && node src/score.mjs && node src/transcript.mjs && node src/analyze.mjs && node src/dashboard.mjs
